deployment_evidence.production_promotion: PR #505 (feat/iso-excellence-remediation): ISO Excellence Full-System Remediation CU-1 through CU-8. CI 24103079719 success -> staging 24103320283 success -> production 24103624658 success (headSha: 9b004874).
deployment_evidence.staging_smoke_results: Deploy to Azure Staging: success (run 24103320283). GENSPARK_API_KEY, AI_PROVIDER=genspark, GENSPARK_MODEL=claude-opus-4-6-1m confirmed in staging app settings.
deployment_evidence.prod_deploy_proof_v2: Deploy to Azure Production: success (run 24103624658, conclusion: success). BUILD_SHA=9b004874, GENSPARK_API_KEY, AI_PROVIDER=genspark confirmed in production app settings.
deployment_evidence.governance_note: PR #505 implements ISO Excellence Full-System Remediation (8 change units from the iso_excellence_full-system_remediation plan). P0: GENSPARK_API_KEY wired into deploy-staging.yml and deploy-production.yml; key stored in Azure KV (kv-qgp-staging, kv-qgp-prod) and GitHub Secrets; AI_PROVIDER=genspark now active in production. P1: Dialog state lifecycle fixed; coverage stats sourced from backend by_standard; link evidence flow added inline to auto-tagger; integration tests for /analyze and /soa. P2: All dynamic Tailwind classes replaced with explicit lookup maps; SoA dialog inner scroll; source_standard filter on cross-standard mappings; by_standard partial_coverage field added to TypeScript types. P3: SoA evidence notes field; /compliance/soa docstring disambiguation; Annex A SoA label/button rename; search_clauses includes ancestor rows; OpenAPI baseline and docs/contracts/openapi.json regenerated. 1387 backend unit tests, 198 frontend tests, all CI gates pass.
deployment_evidence.pr_checks_passed: PR #505: CI 24103079719 success; Build and Deploy Job pass; Performance Budget pass; Frontend Tests pass; Unit Tests 1387/1387 pass; Integration Tests pass; All Checks Passed gate: success
changes_this_release: CU-1 (P0): GENSPARK_API_KEY wired into deploy-staging.yml + deploy-production.yml; Azure KV fetch + AI_PROVIDER=genspark + model settings
CU-1 (P0): GENSPARK_API_KEY stored in kv-qgp-staging, kv-qgp-prod, and GitHub Secrets GENSPARK_API_KEY
CU-1 (P0): .env.example + docs/ADMIN_GUIDE.md + src/core/config.py updated with full AI provider documentation
CU-2 (P1): Auto-tagger dialog onOpenChange now resets deepAnalysisResult/showDeepAnalysis/deepAnalyzing
CU-2 (P1): handleAutoTag clears showDeepAnalysis; handleDeepAnalysis pre-clears stale result; both clear autoTagResults on error
CU-3 (P1): complianceStats now sources covered/partial directly from backend by_standard response
CU-3 (P1): _standard_coverage aligned with main formula (full=2+, partial=1); exposes partial_coverage in by_standard
CU-3 (P1): covered_clauses in standard response counts full+partial (any coverage) for backward compat
CU-4 (P1): Link Evidence inline flow: Link2 button per auto-tag result; entity type/ID/title form; calls linkEvidence; refreshes evidenceLinks
CU-5 (P1): New integration tests: POST /analyze (keyword fallback, structure, auth); GET /soa (93 controls, structure, statistics, notes field)
CU-5 (P1): New frontend tests: Deep Analysis button, Annex A SoA button, dialog state reset
CU-6 (P2): All dynamic Tailwind class interpolations replaced with explicit static lookup maps (6 maps: icon, bg, tree icon, result icon, percentage, progress)
CU-6 (P2): SoA dialog restructured with overflow-hidden outer + max-h-[50vh] inner scroll for 93-control list
CU-7 (P2): crossStandardMappingsApi.list now passes source_standard: selectedClause.standard to prevent cross-standard clause number ambiguity
CU-8 (P2): ComplianceCoverageResponse.by_standard type extended with partial_coverage and gaps fields
CU-8 (P2): notes field added to generate_soa evidence payload
CU-8 (P2): /compliance/soa endpoint docstring disambiguates from /iso27001/soa (DB-backed ISMS SoA entity)
CU-8 (P2): Button renamed from 'Generate SoA' to 'Annex A SoA'; dialog title updated to 'Annex A Evidence SoA'
CU-8 (P3): search_clauses includes ancestor rows so matched children remain visible in the clause tree
CU-8 (P3): openapi-baseline.json and docs/contracts/openapi.json regenerated (532 paths; /analyze and /soa present)
